title: Estatísticas Postflop: AF, WTSD, W$SD, CBet
plan: Add went_to_showdown column to hands table in src/db/schema.py with migration support
Update src/parsers/ggpoker.py and src/parsers/pokerstars.py to detect showdown and set went_to_showdown flag during parsing
Update src/parsers/base.py HandData dataclass to include went_to_showdown field
Add repository query methods in src/db/repository.py: get_postflop_action_sequences, get_showdown_hands, identify last preflop aggressor for CBet detection
Implement postflop stats calculation in src/analyzers/cash.py: AF, AFq, WTSD%, W$SD%, CBet%, Fold to CBet%, Check-Raise% with per-street and overall breakdowns, health ranges, and position breakdowns
Add weekly trend aggregation logic in analyzer for time-series postflop stats
Add Postflop Analysis section to src/reports/cash_report.py with stats grid, position breakdown, badges, and weekly trend table/chart
Backfill went_to_showdown for existing hands in database via migration or import pipeline update
Write comprehensive tests in tests/test_stats.py for all postflop stat calculations, showdown detection, CBet identification, check-raise detection, and health classifications
Run full quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
